options.command: uv run --project python/kernel python -c "import tuvren_kernel" && uv run --project python/kernel-conformance-adapter python -c "import tuvren_kernel_adapter" && uv run --project python/kernel-certification python -c "import tuvren_kernel_certification"

uv run --project python/kernel-conformance-adapter ruff check python/kernel-conformance-adapter/src && uv run --project python/kernel-conformance-adapter ruff format --check python/kernel-conformance-adapter/src && uv run --project python/kernel-certification ruff check python/kernel-certification/src && uv run --project python/kernel-certification ruff format --check python/kernel-certification/src
